MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY WONG, EDITH LEE, JEFF AS TO DEFENDANT ADSANATHAM, KANSINEE JUNG, LYMAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-29-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, EDITH LEE, JEFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ADSANATHAM, KANSINEE JUNG, LYMAN $565.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $675.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ADSANATHAM, KANSINEE JUNG, LYMAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WONG, EDITH LEE, JEFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
